title: Add detail panel maximize/restore commands
description:
Add CLI commands to maximize or restore the detail panel.

Commands:
  kbs console maximize   - Maximize detail panel to full width
  kbs console restore    - Restore detail panel to previous width

Behavior:
- Maximize: Sets detailMaximized=true, hides board
- Restore: Sets detailMaximized=false, shows board
- Only works when detail panel is open (selectedTask != null)
- Should match existing maximize button behavior
- Escape key should still work to restore

Implementation:
- Add DetailPanelMaximized UIControl event (with boolean value)
- Frontend handler updates detailMaximized state
- Error if called when no issue is selected
creator: ryan.porter
